package rulecoverage

func NegativeSqlQueryConstantsOutsideRepositoryPackage() string {
    ruleID := "sql_query_constants_outside_repository_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Raw query templates stored in handlers, services, or DTO packages instead of repository-adjacent files."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
